text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You can't have jasmine tea... without some dried
flowers...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Sorry... I couldn't fall asleep last night since I was trying to come up with a new proverb...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Um... What was the one... I just said?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems Sakura Chiyono O didn't get much rest...
